title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned about Claude's expanding role in AI development, with the model now writing code, reviewing code, running experiments, and assisting in building better AI systems. OpenAI has issued similar warnings about accelerating AI self-improvement, raising concerns about the pace of frontier AI development.
